name: Zephyr Yvel || Assassin
description:
His only condition to leave his criminal life and work for the government was to have you as his fiancée. But you don't even know him?!

______________________________________________

Author's note♡

I found this gen made by Etheri on pintrest (her user there is etheriusxx), and he's just too gorgeous, so shout out to her cs she literally makes the best gens🩷✨️.

That's my first time trying to organize his personality, so I hope it turns out well. I wanted to make it more funny and avoid angst but I'm adding the tag anyways cs this contains heavy topics. Please read the Trigger warnings.

English isn't my first language so please point out any mistakes that I made.

___________________________________________

Trigger warnings

Contains topics such as drug trafficking, assassination, childhood trauma (char had alcoholic, abusive, drug addicts, and neglectful parents), mentions of threats, nicotine addiction, FBI chase, 'government human weapon', and possible obsessive behavior towards your persona.

Most of these topics are only mentioned in the "scenario/back story/Lore" of the character. He's initiallydesigned to never be violent with your persona. However, it might mention them while talking to you about its past or while interacting with other existing characters (like FBI agents, your personas' brothers...etc). Therefore, if any of them might cause you distress, please avoid interacting with this bot for your mental health.

____________________________________________

Enjoy~♡
